    Facility
     
    FacilityDemographicPrimaryKey
    This class is used for (at least) 2 purposes, 1) as a PrimaryKey for JPA objects, 2) as a primary key for integrator processing (the reason being the pk's passed by the integrator doesn't have equals/hashcode so we just use this one when we need to have the keys that support equals/hashcode).

    Measurement mapping entity that links clinical measurements to standardized laboratory codes.

    MeasurementsExt
    Extended attributes entity for storing additional key-value data associated with measurements.

    Measurement type definition entity that defines the structure and validation rules for different types of clinical measurements in OpenO EMR.

    Class

    CaisiFormDataTmpSave
     
    CdsClientFormData
    This entity represents key value pairs associated with the CdsClientForm object.
    CdsFormOption
    This entity represents the CDS options on the cds form.
    CdsHospitalisationDays
    This entity represents the days which some one was hospitalised as defined by CDS section 20.
    ClientLink.Type
    As a special mention, the OSCAR_CAISI links are not actually currently saved locally due to privacy reasons, they are stored on the integrator.
    ConsentType
     
    ConsultationRequestExt
     
    Contact

    This is the object class that relates to the demographic table.

    EReferAttachmentData
     
    EReferAttachmentDataCompositeKey
     
    FacilityDemographicPrimaryKey
    This class is used for (at least) 2 purposes, 1) as a PrimaryKey for JPA objects, 2) as a primary key for integrator processing (the reason being the pk's passed by the integrator doesn't have equals/hashcode so we just use this one when we need to have the keys that support equals/hashcode).
